ksa_text: Skill in developing AI system documentation and technical specifications, including creating model cards, system cards, datasheets, documenting system context and intended use, and producing documentation meeting regulatory compliance standards for EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-005 (AG, Skill) maps to Market Research Analyst scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.6287 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.629, eu_ai_act=0.574, dcwf=0.424. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.6287 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-S-005 (AG, composite 0.6287) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.6287 for AG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.629, eu_ai_act=0.574, dcwf=0.424 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.6287 exceeds external evidence threshold for AG domain inclusion in Market Research Analyst.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.6287, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
